limit_over_max_response.message: Invalid com.atproto.repo.listRecords params: integer too big (maximum 100, got 101)

rkey_range_filter_observation: rkeyStart/rkeyEnd IGNORED by the server (all 40 records returned instead of 9 expected). Deprecated fields per the atproto lexicon; a range fold MUST enumerate via cursor and filter client-side, or use sync.getBlocks(cids).
inverted_range_behavior: returned 40 records (server treats inverted range as empty or clamps)
